name: Black Beans (Randelman)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green bell pepper, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook black beans with bay leaf and green bell pepper until they are very tender and starting to crack open, about 2 hours. Add more water as necessary.
2. Prepare SOFRITO: In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic, onion, and chopped green bell pepper; cook, stirring, until the onion is translucent, about 8-10 minutes. Stir in cumin, cider vinegar, and chopped green chili; mix well.
3. Add the prepared sofrito to the beans and stir until well combined. Cook over low heat, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the beans crack open. Season to taste and serve.
